political.s: Bath & Body Works reported $62,887 in PAC contributions and $310,000 in lobbying spending in 2024. The company states it does not make corporate political donations, though the company maintains lobbying activities focused on industry matters.

charity.s: Bath & Body Works Foundation donated over $17 million in in-kind products in 2024 and has distributed over $322 million to nonprofits historically. The company focuses on disaster relief, hygiene needs in underserved communities, cancer research through Pelotonia, and domestic violence prevention through partnerships with established nonprofits.
charity.focus: Disaster relief, hygiene needs, cancer research, domestic violence prevention

environment.s: Bath & Body Works has science-based targets validated by SBTi to reduce Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions 63% by 2035. The company targets 50% recyclable/reusable/compostable packaging by 2025 and aims for 33% post-consumer recycled content in plastic packaging. However, environmental groups note limited ingredient sustainability and heavy use of problematic materials like uncertified palm oil.

labor.s: Bath & Body Works maintains supplier codes of conduct based on ILO standards and has an in-house Wellness Center for associates. The company has a DEI rating of 4.2/5 on Glassdoor. However, median employee compensation is approximately $9,834-$10,669 annually, while CEO compensation reached $12.6 million in fiscal 2024, resulting in a CEO pay ratio exceeding 1,200:1.

dei.s: Bath & Body Works is a strong DEI advocate, named a Diversity First Top 50 Company by the Diversity Research Institute in 2023. The company appointed a Chief Diversity Officer and emphasizes DEI as a core value for 20 years. Women comprise 55% of director-level and above positions and 50% of board members.

animals.s: Bath & Body Works does not voluntarily test on animals but has stated it complies with testing requirements when mandated by law. The company is not certified by Leaping Bunny or PETA as fully cruelty-free. Sources differ on compliance status, with some indicating animal testing when required by regulations in certain markets.

guns.s: Not applicable - Bath & Body Works is a personal care and home fragrance retailer with no involvement in firearms sales or manufacturing.

privacy.s: Bath & Body Works maintains comprehensive privacy policies covering data collection, retention, and security practices. The company works with service providers in multiple countries including India and China. While safeguards are described as administrative and technical, data is processed in multiple jurisdictions globally.

execPay.s: CEO Gina Boswell earned $12.6 million in fiscal 2024 while median employee compensation was $9,834-$10,669 annually. This results in a CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio exceeding 1,200:1. Compensation is heavily weighted toward performance-based equity with 60% of CEO long-term incentives in PSUs.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
